name: Braided Water Hyacinth Folio Basket with Faux Leather Handles - Threshold™: Storage & Organization, 11" Cube Compatible
description:
Make a practical addition to your home decor with the Braided Water Hyacinth Folio Basket with Faux-Leather Handles from Threshold™. Woven from water hyacinth, this natural folio basket features a braided design with a brown stripe for visual appeal. It's designed in a rectangular shape with an open top, making it great for stashing toys, books and other items you want to have close at hand in one spot. You can display this braided folio basket on a tabletop or on a shelf to save space and easily move it with the built-in faux-leather handles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Interior Dimensions: 5.75 Inches (H) x 11.5 Inches (W) x 16.5 Inches (L)
